parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO leads (nombre, rubro, ciudad, pais, whatsapp, website, direccion, rating, reviews_count, origen, score_prospecto, status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.nombre.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.rubro.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.ciudad }}',
  '{{ $json.pais }}',
  '{{ $json.whatsapp }}',
  '{{ $json.website.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.direccion.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.rating || 0 }},
  {{ $json.reviews_count || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.origen }}',
  {{ $json.score_prospecto }},
  'nuevo'
)
ON CONFLICT (whatsapp) DO UPDATE SET
  rating = EXCLUDED.rating,
  reviews_count = EXCLUDED.reviews_count,
  score_prospecto = GREATEST(leads.score_prospecto, EXCLUDED.score_prospecto),
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, nombre, whatsapp, status;
